en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. A PSALM OF DAVID. I waited patiently for the LORD; he inclined to me and heard my cry.
zh: 我曾切切等候耶和華； 他轉向我，聽了我的呼求。

en: He drew me up from the pit of destruction, out of the miry bog, and set my feet upon a rock, making my steps secure.
zh: 他把我從荒蕪的坑裡， 從泥沼中拉上來； 他使我的腳站在磐石上， 又使我的腳步穩定。

en: He put a new song in my mouth, a song of praise to our God. Many will see and fear, and put their trust in the LORD.
zh: 他使我口唱新歌， 讚美我們的 神； 許多人看見了，就必懼怕， 並且要倚靠耶和華。

en: Blessed is the man who makes the LORD his trust, who does not turn to the proud, to those who go astray after a lie!
zh: 那倚靠耶和華， 不轉向高傲和偏向虛謊的人的， 這人是有福的。

en: You have multiplied, O LORD my God, your wondrous deeds and your thoughts toward us; none can compare with you! I will proclaim and tell of them, yet they are more than can be told.
zh: 耶和華我的 神啊！ 你所行的奇事，並你向我們所懷的意念很多， 沒有人可以和你相比； 如果我要述說陳明， 也多到不能勝數。

en: Sacrifice and offering you have not desired, but you have given me an open ear. Burnt offering and sin offering you have not required.
zh: 祭品和禮物不是你喜悅的。 你開通了我的耳朵； 燔祭和贖罪祭，不是你要求的。

en: Then I said, "Behold, I have come; in the scroll of the book it is written of me:
zh: 那時我說：“看哪！我來了， 經卷上已經記載我的事；

en: I desire to do your will, O my God; your law is within my heart."
zh: 我的 神啊！我樂意遵行你的旨意； 你的律法常在我的心裡。”

en: I have told the glad news of deliverance in the great congregation; behold, I have not restrained my lips, as you know, O LORD.
zh: 我要在大會中傳揚公義的福音； 我必不禁止我的嘴唇； 耶和華啊！這是你知道的。

en: I have not hidden your deliverance within my heart; I have spoken of your faithfulness and your salvation; I have not concealed your steadfast love and your faithfulness from the great congregation.
zh: 我沒有把你的公義隱藏在心裡； 我已經述說了你的信實和救恩； 在大會中，我沒有隱瞞你的慈愛和誠實。

en: As for you, O LORD, you will not restrain your mercy from me; your steadfast love and your faithfulness will ever preserve me!
zh: 耶和華啊！求你的憐憫不要向我止息； 願你的慈愛和誠實常常保護我。

en: For evils have encompassed me beyond number; my iniquities have overtaken me, and I cannot see; they are more than the hairs of my head; my heart fails me.
zh: 因有無數的禍患圍繞著我； 我的罪孽追上了我，使我不能看見； 它們比我的頭髮還多， 以致我心驚膽戰。

en: Be pleased, O LORD, to deliver me! O LORD, make haste to help me!
zh: 耶和華啊！求你開恩搭救我； 耶和華啊！求你快來幫助我。

en: Let those be put to shame and disappointed altogether who seek to snatch away my life; let those be turned back and brought to dishonor who desire my hurt!
zh: 願那些尋找我，要毀滅我命的， 一同抱愧蒙羞； 願那些喜悅我遭害的， 退後受辱。

en: Let those be appalled because of their shame who say to me, "Aha, Aha!"
zh: 願那些對我說：“啊哈！啊哈！”的， 都因羞愧而驚惶。

en: But may all who seek you rejoice and be glad in you; may those who love your salvation say continually, "Great is the LORD!"
zh: 願所有尋求你的， 都因你歡喜快樂； 願那些喜愛你救恩的， 常說：“要尊耶和華為大。”

en: As for me, I am poor and needy, but the Lord takes thought for me. You are my help and my deliverer; do not delay, O my God!
zh: 至於我，我是困苦貧窮的； 主仍顧念我。 你是我的幫助，我的拯救； 我的 神啊！求你不要耽延。
